name: Logic, Optimization, and Artificial Intelligence

description: arXiv:2607.15532v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Logic and optimization can, in combination, make valuable contributions to rule-based AI. Logic is the obvious medium for encoding a rule base and drawing inferences from it, while optimization provides a powerful technology for computing inferences. Their combination has taken on new relevance amid a growing concern for transparency in AI. which...
author: J. N. Hooker
